name: codex-design-superpowers
description: Product, web, mobile, desktop, brand, and UI/UX design workflows for Codex using GPT-5.5 outcome-first prompting, design research, design systems, implementation, and review gates.

interface.shortDescription: High-end UI/UX, product design, web, mobile, and design-system workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: Use Codex Design to research visual direction, define product UX, build high-fidelity web and mobile interfaces, enforce consistent design systems, implement reusable components, and review visual quality before delivery.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Design to create a high-end product UI for this feature.
Use Codex Design to audit this app for UI/UX consistency and implement the fixes.
Use Codex Design to turn this product idea into web and mobile design artifacts.
